content_en:
Abu Sa’eed Al-Khudree # reported that the Prophet i said, “In my nation there will be the Mahdee. If his period is shortened, then (his rule is) for seven (years); otherwise, it is for nine (years). My nation will enjoy blessings the likes of which it had never previously heard of; the earth will give forth its fruits and none of it will be stored away. Wealth in those days will be abundant. A man will stand and say, 'O Mahdee, give me.’ He will answer, ‘Take.” (Ibn Maajah)

Abu As-Sadeeq An-Naajee related that Abu Sa’eed Al-Khudree 2s said, “We feared that there would be a Hadath (something new but objectionable) and so we asked the Prophet ##.” He 2 said, “Indeed in my nation there is the Mahdee, and he will come out and live for 5 or 7 or 9. A man will go to him and say, ’O Mahdee, give me’ He will throw handfuls into the man’s garment, filling it with whatever the man is able to carry.” (At-Tirmidhee) This hadith is Hasan, and it has been related through other chains from the Prophet i This indicates that after he appears, the Mahdee will at most live for another 9 years, and at the very least for 5 or 7 years. And perhaps he is the Khaleefah who throws handfuls of wealth to the people — and Allah # knows best. During his rule, crops will be plentiful, wealth will be abundant, his rule will be strong and victorious, his enemy will be subdued, and goodness during his days will be

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 55

In another narration, Abu Sa’eed reported that a man said, “By Allah, no ruler comes to us except that he is more evil than the one before him.” Abu Sa’eed replied, “Had it not been for something I heard from the Messenger of Allah 2%, I would have said the same as you say. I heard the Messenger of Allah #% say, ‘Indeed, from your rulers will be a ruler who will throw handfuls of wealth without counting it. A man will come to him and ask (for charity). The man will spread out his garment while the ruler throws handfuls into it.’ The Messenger of Allah 24 was wearing a coarse over-garment and was displaying what that man would do. He then gathered it at its shoulders and said, “He will take it and leave.” (Ahmad) Ahmad alone related it through this chain.

Anas ibn Maalik said that he heard the Messenger of Allah #¥ say, “We, the children of ‘Abdul-Muttalib, are the chiefs of the dwellers of Paradise - [, Hamzah, ‘Alee, Ja’far, Al-Hasan, Al-Husain, and AlMahdee.” (Ibn Maajah) However, one of the narrators of this hadith is unknown, and this hadith is Munkar.

In another narration, Anas ibn Maalik .& velated that the Messenger of Allah #% said, “The matter will not increase except in harshness, nor the world except in tarning away, nor men except in miserliness and avarice. And the Hour will not arrive except upon the most evil of people. And Al-Mahdee is none other than ‘Lesa ibn Maryam.” (Ibu Maajah) This hadith is known to be related by Muhanunad Ibn Khaalid Al-Jundee As-Sin’aanee, the Mu’dhdhin and Shaikh of AshShaafi’ee. More than one narration has been related from him, and he is not unknown, as is claimed by Al-Haakim. In fact, it is related from Ibn Mu’een that he ruled him to be trustworthy. Some narrators relate it in the form of a Mursal narration.

At first glance, this last hadith is in conflict with those Ahaadeeth we related, which establish that the Mahdee is not ‘Eesa ion Maryam 3aE and that the Mahdee will come before ‘Eesa ibn Maryam 2% descends — it seems that this is though, and Allah # knows best. However, upon reflection, one should see that there is no contradiction. What is meant in the previous narration is that the true Mahdee, in the complete sense, is “Eesa ibn Maryam 8%; this does not negate the possibility of there being another Mahdee as well — and Allah 4% knows best.

56 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

DIFFERENT TRIALS THAT HAVE OCCURRED AND THAT WILL INCREASE IN INTENSITY AT THE END OF TIMES

If there are many wrongdoers, all will be destroyed, even if there are righteous people among them

Umm Habeebah % reported that Zainab bint Jahsh $ said, “The Prophet #8 once woke up from his sleep with a crimson complexion as he was saying, ‘None has the right to be worshipped but Allah. Woe for the Arabs from an evil that has drawn near. An opening has been made today from the barrier of Yajooj and Majooj, the size of this.’ And he made a circle with his thumb and index finger (to show the size of the gap that was opened). It was said, “Will we be destroyed while the righteous are among us?’ He # said, ‘Yes, if AL Khabath (wickedness, sins, and hypocrisy) increase.” (Bukhaaree)

In another narration, Umm Salamah “%, the wife of the Prophet #¢ said, “The Prophet # woke up alarmed and said, ‘How perfect Allah is! What has been sent down tonight from treasures? And what has Allah sent down in terms of trials (treasures very often Jead to trials)? Who will wake up the dwellers of the apartments (Le. his wives) so that they will pray? Many are they who are dressed in this world but will be naked in the Hereafter.” (Bukhaaree)

Trials That Will Occur Among Muslims

“Urwah related that Usaamah ibn Zaid # said, “The Prophet 2 overlooked a high structure from the structures of Madeenah, and he # said, “Do you see what I see?’ They said, ’No.’ He #4 said, “For indeed I see the trial falling in your homes like the falling of the rain.” (Bukhaaree and Muslim)

It has been related that Abu Hurairah # reported this hadith from the Prophet #g: “Time will converge (scholars have different opinions about this saying. Some understand it literally, others say it points to the nearness of the Day of Resurrection, and yet others say it means that people will not be blessed in their time, and so day and night will go by quickly for them); knowledge will decrease; miserliness and avarice will remain; trials will appear; and

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 57

Al-Haraj will increase.” The Companions asked, “O Messenger of Allah, and what is it?’ He 4% said, “Killing, killing.”

Every Era That Comes Is Better Than The One That Follows It

Az-Zubair related that ‘Adee said, “We went to’ Anas ibn Maalik and complained to him about the ill-treatment we receive from AlHajjaaj. He said, ‘Be patient, for no era comes upon a people except that the one that follows it is even worse, (and this will continue) until you meet your Lord. I heard this from your Prophet #%.”” (Bukhanree) At-Tirmidhee related this hadith through Ath-Thauree and he said, “Hasan Saheeht.”” This meaning is captured by the phrase of the commoners, “You consider the end of every year to be base.”

Trials That Muslims Should Try To Stay Far Away From

Abu Hurairah % related that the Messenger of Allah #% said, “There will be trials ~ the one who sits during them is better than the one who stands; the one who stands during them is better than the one who walks; the one who walks during them is better than the one who goes forth, facing them and taking them on. During those trials, whoever finds a refuge or a sanctuary to protect him, then let him return to it.” (Bukhaaree and Muslint)

The Raising Of Trustworthiness From The Hearts

58 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

amount of Eemaan in his heart. There was a time when I didn’t mind whom it was from you that I traded with: if he was Muslim, then his Islam (his religion and trustworthiness) would prevent him from treachery; and if we was a Christian or a Jew, then the one in authority over him would prevent him (from wronging me). As for today, I would not trade except with so-and-so and with so-and-so.” (Bukhaaree)

The Prophet 24 Informed Us That The Trial Will Appear From The East

ibn ‘Umar .% related that the Messenger of Allah stood beside the pulpit, facing the East, and he #¢ said, “Lo! Indeed the trial is here, from where the horn of the Devil rises,” or he said, “the horn of the sun (i.e., from the East, the horn being the first part of the sun visible as it rises).” (Muslim)

Trials Will Increase Until The Living Will Envy The Dead

The Prophet # Informed Us That, Before The Coming Of The Hour, Idol-Worship Will Return To Some Areas Among The Arabs

Huge Quantity Of Wealth That Will Be Revealed In Arab Lands, And The Discord And Death That Will Result

Abu Hurairah 4 related that the Messenger of Allah #@ said, “The time draws near when the Furaat will reveal a treasure of gold;
content_id:
Abu Sa'eed Al-Khudree # melaporkan bahwa Nabi # bersabda, "Di dalam umatku akan ada Al-Mahdee. Jika masanya dipersingkat, maka (pemerintahannya) adalah tujuh (tahun); jika tidak, maka sembilan (tahun). Umatku akan menikmati berkah yang sebelumnya belum pernah mereka dengar sejenisnya; bumi akan mengeluarkan buah-buahnya dan tidak ada satu pun yang disimpan. Kekayaan pada masa itu akan melimpah. Seorang laki-laki akan berdiri dan berkata, 'Wahai Mahdee, berilah aku.' Ia akan menjawab, 'Ambillah.'" (Ibn Maajah)

Abu As-Sadeeq An-Naajee meriwayatkan bahwa Abu Sa'eed Al-Khudree # berkata, "Kami khawatir akan ada Hadath (sesuatu yang baru namun tercela) sehingga kami bertanya kepada Nabi ##." Beliau #% berkata, "Sesungguhnya di dalam umatku ada Al-Mahdee, dan ia akan muncul dan hidup selama 5 atau 7 atau 9 tahun. Seorang laki-laki akan pergi kepadanya dan berkata, 'Wahai Mahdee, berilah aku.' Ia akan melemparkan beberapa genggaman ke pakaian laki-laki itu, memenuhinya dengan apa pun yang mampu dibawa laki-laki itu." (At-Tirmidhee) Hadith ini Hasan, dan telah diriwayatkan melalui sanad-sanad lain dari Nabi #. Ini menunjukkan bahwa setelah ia muncul, Al-Mahdee akan hidup paling lama sembilan tahun lagi, dan paling sedikit lima atau tujuh tahun. Dan mungkin dialah Khalifah yang melemparkan genggaman-genggaman kekayaan kepada orang-orang — dan Allah # Maha Mengetahui. Selama pemerintahannya, tanaman akan subur, kekayaan akan melimpah, pemerintahannya akan kuat dan menang, musuhnya akan tunduk, dan kebaikan pada masanya akan

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 55

Dalam riwayat lain, Abu Sa'eed melaporkan bahwa seorang laki-laki berkata, "Demi Allah, tidak ada penguasa yang datang kepada kami kecuali ia lebih buruk dari yang sebelumnya." Abu Sa'eed menjawab, "Seandainya bukan karena sesuatu yang aku dengar dari Rasulullah #%, aku pasti mengatakan hal yang sama seperti yang kamu katakan. Aku mendengar Rasulullah #% berkata, 'Sesungguhnya, di antara penguasa-penguasamu akan ada seorang penguasa yang akan melemparkan genggaman-genggaman kekayaan tanpa menghitung. Seorang laki-laki akan datang kepadanya dan meminta (sedekah). Laki-laki itu akan membentangkan pakaiannya sementara penguasa melemparkan genggaman-genggaman ke dalamnya.'" Rasulullah #% sedang mengenakan jubah kasar dan memperagakan apa yang akan dilakukan laki-laki itu. Beliau kemudian mengumpulkannya di bahunya dan berkata, "Ia akan mengambilnya dan pergi." (Ahmad) Ahmad sendirian yang meriwayatkannya melalui sanad ini.

Anas ibn Maalik berkata bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah #¥ bersabda, "Kami, anak-anak 'Abdul-Muttalib, adalah pemimpin penghuni surga — aku, Hamzah, 'Alee, Ja'far, Al-Hasan, Al-Husain, dan Al-Mahdee." (Ibn Maajah) Namun, salah satu perawi hadith ini tidak dikenal, dan hadith ini adalah Munkar.

Dalam riwayat lain, Anas ibn Maalik meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #% bersabda, "Urusan tidak akan bertambah kecuali dalam kekerasan, tidak juga dunia kecuali dalam berpaling, tidak juga manusia kecuali dalam kekikiran dan ketamakan. Dan Hari Kiamat tidak akan tiba kecuali pada orang-orang yang paling jahat. Dan Al-Mahdee tidak lain adalah 'Isa ibn Maryam." (Ibn Maajah) Hadith ini diketahui diriwayatkan oleh Muhammad Ibn Khaalid Al-Jundee As-Sin'aanee, Muadzin dan Syaikh Asy-Syaafi'ee. Lebih dari satu riwayat telah diriwayatkan darinya, dan ia tidak asing sebagaimana diklaim oleh Al-Haakim. Bahkan, diriwayatkan dari Ibn Mu'een bahwa ia menilainya sebagai terpercaya. Beberapa perawi meriwayatkannya dalam bentuk Mursal.

Sekilas pandang, hadith terakhir ini bertentangan dengan Ahadits yang kami riwayatkan, yang menetapkan bahwa Al-Mahdee bukan 'Isa ibn Maryam #&% dan bahwa Al-Mahdee akan datang sebelum 'Isa ibn Maryam #% turun — tampaknya demikian, dan Allah # Maha Mengetahui. Namun demikian, dengan perenungan, seseorang harus melihat bahwa tidak ada pertentangan. Yang dimaksud dalam riwayat sebelumnya adalah bahwa Al-Mahdee yang sejati, dalam arti yang sempurna, adalah 'Isa ibn Maryam #%; hal ini tidak meniadakan kemungkinan adanya Al-Mahdee lain juga — dan Allah # Maha Mengetahui.

56 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

BERBAGAI FITNAH YANG TELAH TERJADI DAN YANG AKAN SEMAKIN MEMUNCAK DI AKHIR ZAMAN

Jika banyak orang yang berbuat zalim, semuanya akan binasa, bahkan jika ada orang-orang saleh di antara mereka

Umm Habeebah # melaporkan bahwa Zainab bint Jahsh # berkata, "Nabi #8 suatu kali terbangun dari tidurnya dengan wajah merah padam sambil berkata, 'Tidak ada yang berhak disembah kecuali Allah. Celaka bagi orang-orang Arab dari kejahatan yang telah mendekat. Hari ini telah dibuka sebuah celah dari benteng Ya'juj dan Ma'juj, sebesar ini.' Dan beliau membuat lingkaran dengan ibu jari dan telunjuknya (untuk menunjukkan ukuran celah yang terbuka). Dikatakan, 'Apakah kita akan binasa sementara orang-orang saleh ada di antara kita?' Beliau # berkata, 'Ya, jika Al-Khabats (keburukan, dosa-dosa, dan kemunafikan) bertambah banyak.'" (Bukhaaree)

Dalam riwayat lain, Umm Salamah #, istri Nabi #¢, berkata, "Nabi # terbangun dalam keadaan terkejut dan berkata, 'Maha Suci Allah! Apa yang telah diturunkan malam ini dari perbendaharaan? Dan apa yang telah Allah turunkan berupa fitnah-fitnah (perbendaharaan seringkali menimbulkan fitnah)? Siapa yang akan membangunkan penghuni bilik-bilik (yaitu para istrinya) sehingga mereka akan shalat? Betapa banyaknya mereka yang berpakaian di dunia ini tetapi telanjang di akhirat.'" (Bukhaaree)

Fitnah-Fitnah yang Akan Terjadi di Antara Kaum Muslimin

'Urwah meriwayatkan bahwa Usaamah ibn Zaid # berkata, "Nabi #% memandang dari sebuah bangunan tinggi di Madeenah, dan beliau # berkata, 'Apakah kalian melihat apa yang aku lihat?' Mereka berkata, 'Tidak.' Beliau #4 berkata, 'Karena sesungguhnya aku melihat fitnah yang menimpa rumah-rumah kalian seperti jatuhnya hujan.'" (Bukhaaree dan Muslim)

Telah diriwayatkan bahwa Abu Hurairah # melaporkan hadith ini dari Nabi #g: "Waktu akan semakin konvergen (para ulama memiliki pendapat berbeda tentang ungkapan ini. Sebagian memahaminya secara harfiah, yang lain mengatakan bahwa itu merujuk pada dekatnya Hari Kiamat, dan yang lain lagi mengatakan bahwa itu berarti orang-orang tidak akan mendapat berkah dalam waktu mereka, sehingga siang dan malam akan berlalu dengan cepat bagi mereka); ilmu akan berkurang; kekikiran dan ketamakan akan tetap ada; fitnah-fitnah akan muncul; dan

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 57

Al-Haraj akan meningkat." Para sahabat bertanya, "Wahai Rasulullah, dan apakah itu?" Beliau #% berkata, "Pembunuhan, pembunuhan."

Setiap Era yang Datang Lebih Baik dari yang Mengikutinya

Az-Zubair meriwayatkan bahwa 'Adee berkata, "Kami pergi ke Anas ibn Maalik dan mengadukan kepadanya tentang perlakuan buruk yang kami terima dari Al-Hajjaaj. Ia berkata, 'Bersabarlah, karena tidak ada era yang datang kepada suatu kaum kecuali yang mengikutinya lebih buruk lagi, (dan ini akan berlanjut) hingga kalian bertemu Tuhan kalian. Aku mendengar ini dari Nabi kalian #%.'" (Bukhaaree) At-Tirmidhee meriwayatkan hadith ini melalui Ats-Thauree dan berkata, "Hasan Sahih." Makna ini ditangkap oleh ungkapan orang-orang awam, "Kamu menganggap akhir setiap tahun sebagai yang paling buruk."

Fitnah-Fitnah yang Harus Dijauhi oleh Kaum Muslimin

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #% bersabda, "Akan ada fitnah-fitnah — orang yang duduk selama fitnah itu lebih baik daripada yang berdiri; orang yang berdiri selama fitnah itu lebih baik daripada yang berjalan; orang yang berjalan lebih baik daripada yang pergi menghadapinya dan menanggungnya. Selama fitnah-fitnah itu, barangsiapa menemukan tempat berlindung atau perlindungan untuk melindunginya, maka kembalilah ke sana." (Bukhaaree dan Muslim)

Dicabutnya Amanah dari Hati-Hati

58 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

sebesar iman dalam hatinya. Ada suatu masa ketika aku tidak peduli dengan siapa pun dari kalian yang aku berdagang: jika ia seorang Muslim, maka Islamnya (agama dan amanahnya) akan mencegahnya dari pengkhianatan; dan jika ia adalah seorang Kristen atau Yahudi, maka orang yang berwenang atasnya akan mencegahnya (dari merugikanku). Adapun hari ini, aku tidak akan berdagang kecuali dengan si fulan dan si fulan." (Bukhaaree)

Nabi #% Memberitahukan Kepada Kita Bahwa Fitnah Akan Muncul dari Timur

Ibn 'Umar meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # berdiri di sisi mimbar, menghadap ke Timur, dan beliau #¢ berkata, "Ketahuilah! Sesungguhnya fitnah ada di sini, dari mana tanduk Syaitan muncul," atau beliau berkata, "tanduk matahari (yaitu dari Timur, tanduk merupakan bagian pertama matahari yang terlihat saat terbit)." (Muslim)

Fitnah-Fitnah Akan Semakin Bertambah Hingga Orang yang Hidup Akan Iri kepada Orang yang Mati

Nabi # Memberitahukan Kepada Kita Bahwa, Sebelum Datangnya Hari Kiamat, Penyembahan Berhala Akan Kembali ke Beberapa Daerah di Kalangan Orang-Orang Arab

Kekayaan yang Sangat Besar yang Akan Terungkap di Tanah-Tanah Arab, dan Perselisihan serta Kematian yang Akan Diakibatkannya

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #@ bersabda, "Waktu telah mendekat ketika sungai Furaat akan menyingkap harta dari emas;
content_ar: Abu Sa’eed Al-Khudree # reported that النبي ﷺ i said, “In my nation there will be the Mahdee. إذا his period is shortened, then (his rule is) for seven (years); otherwise, it is for nine (years). My nation will enjoy البركات the likes of which it had never previously heard of; the earth will give forth its fruits and none of it will be stored away. الثروة in those days will be abundant. A man will stand and say, 'O Mahdee, give me.’ He will answer, ‘Take.” (Ibn Maajah) Abu As-Sadeeq An-Naajee related that Abu Sa’eed Al-Khudree 2s said, “We feared that there would be a Hadath (something new but objectionable) and لذا we asked النبي ﷺ ##.” He 2 said, “Indeed in my nation there is the Mahdee, and he will come out and live for 5 or 7 or 9. A man will go to him and say, ’O Mahdee, give me’ He will throw handfuls into the man’s garment, filling it with whatever the man is able to carry.” (At-Tirmidhee) This الحديث is حسن, and it has been related through other chains from النبي ﷺ i This indicates that بعد he appears, the Mahdee will at most live for another 9 years, and at the very least for 5 or 7 years. And perhaps he is the Khaleefah who throws handfuls of الثروة to the people — and الله # knows best. خلال his rule, crops will be plentiful, الثروة will be abundant, his rule will be strong and victorious, his enemy will be subdued, and goodness خلال his days will be الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 55 In another narration, Abu Sa’eed reported that a man said, “By الله, no ruler comes to us except that he is more الشر than the one قبل him.” Abu Sa’eed replied, “Had it not been for something I heard from الرسول ﷺ of الله 2%, I would have said the same as you say. I heard الرسول ﷺ of الله #% say, ‘Indeed, from your rulers will be a ruler who will throw handfuls of الثروة without counting it. A man will come to him and ask (for الصدقة). The man will spread out his garment بينما the ruler throws handfuls into it.’ الرسول ﷺ of الله 24 was wearing a coarse over-garment and was displaying what that man would do. He then gathered it at its shoulders and said, “He will take it and leave.” (أحمد) أحمد alone related it through this chain. أنس ibn Maalik said that he heard الرسول ﷺ of الله #¥ say, “We, the الأولاد of ‘Abdul-Muttalib, are the chiefs of the dwellers of الجنة - [, Hamzah, ‘Alee, Ja’far, Al-حسن, Al-Husain, and AlMahdee.” (Ibn Maajah) غير أن, one of the narrators of this الحديث is unknown, and this الحديث is Munkar. In another narration, أنس ibn Maalik .& velated that الرسول ﷺ of الله #% said, “The matter will not increase except in harshness, nor the الدنيا except in tarning away, nor men except in miserliness and avarice. And the Hour will not arrive except upon the most الشر of people. And Al-Mahdee is none other than ‘Lesa ibn Maryam.” (Ibu Maajah) This الحديث is known to be related by Muhanunad Ibn Khaalid Al-Jundee As-الذنب’aanee, the Mu’dhdhin and Shaikh of AshShaafi’ee. More than one narration has been related from him, and he is not unknown, as is claimed by Al-Haakim. In fact, it is related from Ibn Mu’een that he ruled him to be trustworthy. Some narrators relate it in the form of a Mursal narration. At أولاً glance, this last الحديث is in conflict with those Ahaadeeth we related, which establish that the Mahdee is not ‘Eesa ion Maryam 3aE and that the Mahdee will come قبل ‘Eesa ibn Maryam 2% descends — it seems that this is though, and الله # knows best. غير أن, upon reflection, ينبغي للمرء see that there is no contradiction. What is meant in the previous narration is that the true Mahdee, in the complete sense, is “Eesa ibn Maryam 8%; this does not negate the possibility of there being another Mahdee as well — and الله 4% knows best. 56 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations DIFFERENT الابتلاءات THAT HAVE OCCURRED AND THAT WILL INCREASE IN INTENSITY AT THE END OF TIMES إذا there are many wrongdoers, all will be destroyed, even إذا there are الصالح people among them Umm Habeebah % reported that Zainab bint Jahsh $ said, “النبي ﷺ #8 حين woke up from his sleep with a crimson complexion as he was saying, ‘None has the الحق to be worshipped but الله. Woe for the Arabs from an الشر that has drawn near. An opening has been made today from the barrier of Yajooj and Majooj, the size of this.’ And he made a circle with his thumb and index finger (to show the size of the gap that was opened). It was said, “Will we be destroyed بينما the الصالح are among us?’ He # said, ‘Yes, إذا AL Khabath (wickedness, الذنوب, and hypocrisy) increase.” (Bukhaaree) In another narration, Umm Salamah “%, the الزوجة of النبي ﷺ #¢ said, “النبي ﷺ # woke up alarmed and said, ‘How perfect الله is! What has been sent down tonight from treasures? And what has الله sent down in terms of الابتلاءات (treasures very often Jead to الابتلاءات)? Who will wake up the dwellers of the apartments (Le. his wives) لذا that they will pray? Many are they who are dressed in this الدنيا but will be naked in الآخرة.” (Bukhaaree) الابتلاءات That Will Occur Among المسلمون “Urwah related that Usaamah ibn Zaid # said, “النبي ﷺ 2 overlooked a high structure from the structures of Madeenah, and he # said, “Do you see what I see?’ قالوا, ’No.’ He #4 said, “For indeed I see the الابتلاء falling in your homes like the falling of the rain.” (Bukhaaree and مسلم) It has been related that أبو هريرة # reported this الحديث from النبي ﷺ #g: “Time will converge (العلماء have different opinions about this saying. Some understand it literally, others say it points to the nearness of the Day of البعث, and yet others say it means that people will not be blessed in their time, and لذا day and night will go by quickly for them); العلم will decrease; miserliness and avarice will remain; الابتلاءات will appear; and الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 57 Al-Haraj will increase.” The الصحابة asked, “O Messenger of الله, and what is it?’ He 4% said, “Killing, killing.” Every Era That Comes Is Better Than The One That Follows It Az-Zubair related that ‘Adee said, “We went to’ أنس ibn Maalik and complained to him about the ill-treatment we receive from AlHajjaaj. قال, ‘Be patient, for no era comes upon a people except that the one that follows it is even worse, (and this will continue) حتى you meet your Lord. I heard this from your النبي #%.”” (Bukhanree) At-Tirmidhee related this الحديث through Ath-Thauree and قال, “حسن Saheeht.”” This meaning is captured by the phrase of the commoners, “You consider the end of every year to be base.” الابتلاءات That المسلمون Should Try To Stay Far Away From أبو هريرة % related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #% said, “There will be الابتلاءات ~ the one who sits خلال them is better than the one who stands; the one who stands خلال them is better than the one who walks; the one who walks خلال them is better than the one who goes forth, facing them and taking them on. خلال those الابتلاءات, whoever finds a refuge or a sanctuary to protect him, then let him return to it.” (Bukhaaree and Muslint) The Raising Of Trustworthiness From The القلوب 58 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations amount of Eemaan in his القلب. There was a time عندما I didn’t العقل whom it was from you that I traded with: إذا he was مسلم, then his الإسلام (his religion and trustworthiness) would prevent him from treachery; and إذا we was a Christian or a Jew, then the one in authority over him would prevent him (from wronging me). أما today, I would not trade except with لذا-and-لذا and with لذا-and-لذا.” (Bukhaaree) النبي ﷺ 24 Informed Us That The الابتلاء Will Appear From The East ibn ‘عمر .% related that الرسول ﷺ of الله stood beside the pulpit, facing the East, and he #¢ said, “Lo! Indeed the الابتلاء is here, from where the horn of the الشيطان rises,” or قال, “the horn of the sun (i.e., from the East, the horn being the أولاً part of the sun visible as it rises).” (مسلم) الابتلاءات Will Increase حتى The Living Will الحسد The Dead النبي ﷺ # Informed Us That, قبل The Coming Of The Hour, Idol-Worship Will Return To Some Areas Among The Arabs Huge Quantity Of الثروة That Will Be Revealed In Arab Lands, And The Discord And الموت That Will Result أبو هريرة 4 related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #@ said, “The time draws near عندما the Furaat will reveal a treasure of gold;
